---
id: admin-cancel-order
title: "Admin cancel order"
description: "Cancel an admin-created order. Decrements ticket quota and sends email notification."

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Admin cancel order"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/events/{idOrSlug}/admin/orders/{orderId}/cancel"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Cancel an admin-created order. Decrements ticket quota and sends email notification.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
